mission.outcome: Composition dimensions, supported and custom aspect ratios, and transparent/color backgrounds use one canonical composition.update command and remain identical through projection, codec reload and raster export.
mission.acceptance: A1.4 in docs/integration/ANIMOTO.md plus QUALITY_GATES Compose/runtime/accessibility requirements
mission.stopCondition: Focused tests, global typecheck, scoped lint, browser runtime, projection/reload/export, cleanup, screenshot and independent review are green; real shell mounting remains explicitly owned by A1-04.

architecture.draftPolicy: invalid text stays local and visible; concurrent canonical canvas mutation blocks apply until explicit reload
architecture.renderProof: createSceneProjection and renderSceneExport/renderBrowserSceneExport consume the committed Composition

hostMountSeam.target: Compose branch of the Studio right inspector after the host mounts its canonical ProjectStore/history runtime
hostMountSeam.blocked: The current AppLayout/ProjectContext does not expose the canonical ProjectStore; this slice intentionally does not create a parallel provider or edit layout. Real shell mounting is owned by A1-04.

qualityLoops.delta: feature-owned controller and inspector accept ProjectStore directly
integer, edge, pixel-area and hex validation

qualityLoops.finding: 21:9 reduces to 7:3 and was initially classified custom
qualityLoops.delta: ratio detection uses exact cross multiplication and preset output uses exact multiples

qualityLoops.finding: Invalid drafts need recovery without document mutation
qualityLoops.delta: visible field errors, disabled Apply and Reset

qualityLoops.finding: Separate writes would create partial/history drift
qualityLoops.delta: one composition.update patch contains width, height and background

qualityLoops.finding: Long-lived inspector draft could overwrite an external edit
qualityLoops.delta: revision observation plus baseline conflict detection and explicit reload

qualityLoops.finding: CSS preview alone cannot prove output fidelity
qualityLoops.delta: codec reload, SceneProjection and real export pipeline assertions

qualityLoops.finding: Source tests did not prove real browser controls/export
qualityLoops.delta: Chrome React harness runs Apply, invalid recovery, Canvas2D export and page-fit

qualityLoops.finding: First browser run had one favicon HTTP/log error
qualityLoops.delta: self-contained data favicon; rerun has all five runtime counters at zero

qualityLoops.finding: Compact visual and focus path needed direct inspection
qualityLoops.delta: 900x800 screenshot inspected, selector focusable, eight native controls, no page overflow

qualityLoops.finding: A dimension-only edit could silently flatten an existing canonical short/alpha background
qualityLoops.delta: draft validation preserves #RGB/#RGBA/#RRGGBB/#RRGGBBAA until the user explicitly changes the color

qualityLoops.finding: Applying 1:1 to a valid 16384x4096 canvas could create an over-budget 16384x16384 draft
qualityLoops.delta: ratio sizing now clamps its exact integer unit by both edge and 64 Mi-pixel budgets
data-only descriptor isolation, no-throw/redacted store/result handling, and safe inspector callback/focus recovery

qualityLoops.finding: Independent review found a Chrome temp profile after browser proof
qualityLoops.delta: removed residue and made PASS contingent on CDP close, Chrome/server exit and bounded profile removal

qualityLoops.finding: Second rereview rejected whole-result cloning and under-validated fake successes
qualityLoops.delta: O(target Composition) descriptor reads require canonical result shape/revision/changedIds and exact target output while preserving identity/ownership/layers

qualityLoops.finding: Repeated dev-server transforms made readiness nondeterministic
qualityLoops.delta: dedicated Vite production harness build plus static child server; bounded retry retains stage/health/route/runtime diagnostics and requires per-attempt cleanup

typecheck.result: A prior checkpoint exited 0; the final rerun is blocked by concurrent out-of-scope TS2367/TS2352 errors in tests/contract/manualRegionCommands.test.ts:92,167.

browser.freshRerunNote: Dedicated production harness build and static child server passed on the first fresh attempt in 33 seconds; no dev-transform readiness dependency remained.

screenshot.inspection: Studio-native compact inspector, clear blue 16:9 preview, exact canonical/export readout, no clipped or inaccessible controls.

gateManifest.evidence: Only feature-owned Compose files, focused tests/browser script and A1-03 artifacts changed.
One composition.update revision and one undo entry; undo/redo exact.
zero/fraction/oversize/area/color invalid cases, stale-draft conflict, accessor reads=0, revoked proxies, throwing getSnapshot/dispatch/result and redacted callback failures.
ProjectCodec, SceneProjection, renderSceneExport and Chrome renderBrowserSceneExport agree.
Native labels/radio/select/color/button semantics, field descriptions, alert/status focus and browser focusability; full Axe remains release-level J9.
Synchronous O(1) validation/dispatch; no worker/timer/listener or continuous rAF introduced.
Export surface disposed; browser PASS now proves CDP closed, Chrome/server exited, profile removed and zero matching temp residue.
No dependency/network/secret/runtime URL mutation; color and dimensions are canonical validated data.
Fresh repository typecheck exited 0 after the concurrent manual Region test repairs landed.
Third independent rereview accepted the result boundary, hostile recovery, first-attempt browser journey and cleanup with P0-P3=0.

adversarialAutopsy.strongestObjection: The inspector is not yet mounted in the real Studio shell because that shell does not expose its canonical ProjectStore.
adversarialAutopsy.userHarm: The inspector remains a preparatory slice until A1-04 mounts it in the real Compose route; isolated harness evidence does not establish the final shell journey.
adversarialAutopsy.cause: Canonical ProjectStore integration into AppLayout is owned by a later shell slice; creating another store would violate the architecture.
adversarialAutopsy.fix: Mount the existing ProjectStore/history runtime at the shell, pass it and project.workspace.selectedCompositionId to CompositionCanvasSettingsInspector in the Compose right-inspector branch.
adversarialAutopsy.closingProof: Run the same browser assertions through #/studio/compose at 1440x900, 1280x720 and 200% zoom, then J3 export comparison.
adversarialAutopsy.severity: P2 integration dependency; no defect in this owned slice

independentReview.finalEvidence: 16/16, global typecheck and strict lint passed. O(target) descriptor-only result validation rejected fake/stale/hostile success without traversing unrelated graph data. Fresh browser passed on attempt one with five error counters zero and CDP/Chrome/server/profile/build cleanup plus zero residue.
priorFindings: P2 whole-result traversal and incomplete success validation
